title: MANGA NGE New Manga Stage Thread
display_title: MANGA NGE New Manga Stage Thread
wikitext:
[]: [MANGA] [NGE] New Manga Stage Thread Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Dec 12, 2004 10:34 pm Yup. Bochan_Bird, fan translator of the Eva manga, posted to the Evangelion Mailing List that there will be a new stage in this month's installment of Shonen Ace. So after a year long break, Volume 10 is underway. Bad news is that this still means we won't get volume 10 for another year. :cry:

[]: Post by anatrok » Mon Dec 13, 2004 4:47 pm Wait, what if Sadamoto doesn't do one each month. What if he does like three or four then waits another year to do some more, then we don't get vol. 10 for a year and a half, unless there are some stages already out. (I don't know)

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Dec 28, 2004 3:38 pm The new stage is out via the mailing list, for those who haven't read volume 9, and are getting impatient for it to be available, and you really want to, you can read the fan translations done by Bochan_Bird. http://www.evamonkey.com/stage_translations/ For those that have read volume 9, here's the new stage. Stage 64: Tears Cover: Rei kneeling in school uniform with head down and school bag/briefcase clutched against her chest. Scene: Rei writhes inside the entry plug as the vein-like marks spread over her body from the various Angel -> Eva-00 penetration points Rei: Ku...u...aa...aah... (Eva-00 falls backwards into some trees with a crash, its hands locked around one of the Angel strands penetrating its midsection.) Shinji (in Eva-01 entry plug): Ayanami!! (Inside the Command Center, the struggle is shown on the main screen.) Announcement: The target has physically contacted Eva-00! Misato: What about Eva-00's A.T.Field!? Maya: Deployed! But it's being penetrated by the Angel! Misato (a bit frantic): What about Eva-02!? (Outside, the Angel penetration continues to spread through Eva-02's double-bladed chainsaw.) Kaworu (struggling): Ku-... (The Angel rips the chainsaw from Eva-02's grasp, drags it along the ground, and then suddenly rushes it toward Eva-02, striking the Eva on the inner left shin. Kaworu cries out in pain as the chainsaw bites into Eva-02's shin.) Kaworu: G- Gaahhhh!! (The chainsaw slices through Eva-02's left shin, and the Eva falls backwards into some trees with a crash. The Command Center staff stare with mouths open in shock.) Maya: Eva-02's left leg has been severed! (Kaworu breathes heavily inside the entry plug. Blood drips from Eva-02's severed leg.) Kaworu (thinking): Shit. What a mess. If this struggle gets any more serious, I could be in trouble. (An angel strand rises from the chainsaw and points towards Eva-02.) Kaworu (eyes widen, thinking): What is it going to do...? (Alternately: What should I do...?) (The Angel strand rushes at the fallen Eva-02, striking it in the midsection. Kaworu's head snaps back in pain, and the Angel starts to penetrate Eva-02.) (Inside the Command Center...) Maya: It's no good! Eva-02 is also being penetrated! Ritsuko: Is an Angel... actively attempting primary contact? With Eva...? (Eva-00 continues to struggle with the Angel, but the penetration continues.) Rei (breathing heavily and gasping): Ah...! (Eva-00's status graphs start to beep) Maya: We have danger! Eva-00's biological parts are being violated! The merging has already reached over 5%!! (Shinji clutches futilely at the induction levers inside the entry plug.) Shinji: Father! Send me out! (shouting) Send me out right now!! Misato (looking up over shoulder): Commander...! Gendo (unmoving): ...... (Rei arched back and gasping for breath inside the entry plug. She suddenly has a vision in which she looks down upon a surface of water with ripples spreading outward from a point in front of her.) Rei (thinking): Who is it? (Her eyes widen and she sees a figure of herself, head lowered, rising from the center of the ripples.) Rei (thinking): Me? The me inside Eva? (The figure rises past waist level.) Rei (thinking): No, that's wrong. It's not me. Who? Who are you? (The two "Rei" face each other, Rei floating slightly above the water surface (no vein-like marks), and the other Rei stopped at upper thigh level with its head lowered so that the eyes are hidden.) (Eva-02 grasps at the Angel strand penetrating its midsection. Kaworu sweats/suffers slightly inside the plug but also has a slightly amused expression.) Kaworu (thinking): Haha... Penetrate me, and then just what are you going to do? (Vein-like marks start appearing on his hands which grip the induction levers.) Kaworu (thinking): I could just toss him out if I used my own A.T.Field... but, it would be bad to reveal my true colors now. (Kaworu glares at the vein-like marks (which appear to stop slightly?)) Kaworu (thinking): That's right... so just stay there and behave yourself for a bit. (Rei's inner world...) Rei: Angel... Are you a person that we call an Angel? Other Rei: Won't you become one with me? Rei: No. I am me. I am not you. Other Rei: Yes, but it doesn't matter. It's too late. I will share my heart with you. (Vein-like marks appear and spread rapidly over Rei's body. Rei's eyes widen, but she remains still and does not make a sound.) Other Rei: See, it hurts, doesn't it? Doesn't your heart hurt? (Rei places her hand over her heart.) Rei: Hurt... No, that's not it. Lonely... Yes, it's lonely. Other Rei: Lonely? I don't understand. Rei: You don't like being alone. There are many of us, but you are alone and you don't like that. Other Rei: Is that called lonely? But, that is your heart. You must have noticed it... Since long before... But you pretended like you didn't notice it. That, and also your even uglier heart. Rei (shocked): Ugly...? Other Rei: Your heart that wants Ikari-kun only for yourself. (Image of Shinji standing beside Asuka's sickbed with Rei standing alone in a spotlight and facing the other way) Other Rei: You see Ikari-kun go to Sohryuu=Second's hospital every day... You see him look at Sohryuu=Second's face every day... And how did you feel? (Image of Rei facing the other way) Other Rei: You didn't like it, did you? (Image of Asuka in her sickbed staring blankly at the ceiling Other Rei: You found Sohryuu=Second hateful, didn't you? (Image of the back of Shinji's head) Other Rei: You wanted Ikari-kun to see only you. (Back to image of other Rei in water - head raised slightly to reveal a deep light shining out of one shaded eye) Other Rei: You felt lonely, so you wanted Ikari-kun to stay by your side forever. That is your heart. (Rei stands transfixed with wide eyes) Other Rei: Filled and overflowing with sorrow, hatred and distress... That is your own heart. (A single drop falls through darkness into water, making a small splash, and Rei looks down inside the entry plug to see tears falling onto her lap. Stunned, she raises her hands in a cupping motion and watches as the tears fall through them.) Rei: Tears... Are these tears...? Am I the one who is crying? Is it me? (Eva-00's back plates split open and a huge mass billows out. Distorted shapes of past Angels can be seen in the rapidly expanding bulk.) Shinji: Ayanami!! Misato: Rei!! Misato (to Maya): Forcibly eject the entry plug! Maya: Negative! There's no response! Misato (aghast): No... Gendo: Eva-01's freeze is lifted as of now. Deploy at once! Misato (looking back over shoulder in surprise): What? Gendo (standing): Eva-01's freeze is lifted! Deploy! Misato: Yes, sir. Misato (over radio): Shinji? You heard that, right? Let's go! Shinji (determined inside entry plug): Yes, sir! - End Stage 64

[]: Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Dec 29, 2004 4:30 am this stage is pretty interesting,Sadamoto really has done an excellent work..so i guess by the end of stage 65 Rei II will come to her end..

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Dec 29, 2004 10:44 am Most likely, aside from Asuka being replaced by Kaworu, he's following the sequence from the anime fairly closely.

[]: Post by DatDude » Wed Dec 29, 2004 4:29 pm I am just dieing to know how he' going to handle EoE, and its graphic sceens, but thats a few years off at this rate.

[]: Scans? Post by Mad Max » Wed Dec 29, 2004 10:19 pm Is there any place that provides scanalations for the mangas? I've been looking at places, but most are not up to date.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Dec 30, 2004 12:10 am Highly unlikely, considering the fact that I've looked on more than one occasion. The problem with the Eva manga is that its distribution is so erratic (with multiple gaps of upwards of a year) most scanlators would get tired of it. Not to mention its a licensed series. Most fan sub/scanlators are pretty good about discontinuing licensed series. The best you can do when it comes to the Eva manga is read the fan translations that Bochan_Bird does. And unlike scanlations, they're small text files, and he whips them out a day or two after the stage is published. I posted a link in this topic with an archive of the last two volumes worth of stages. If you're that desperate to know what happens, read them. Otherwise go out and actually buy it.

[]: Post by Xanatose » Thu Dec 30, 2004 10:12 pm Ahh, joy. Whenever I read anything new that's even remotely related to Kaworu, I squeel like a fangirl. (^__^;; ) Thanks for posting that link to the translations.

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 03, 2005 9:43 pm I'm disappointed. I've long thought that Rei's spiritual encounter with Armisael (the Inner Universe scene) was sourly underdone, and it's a pity Sadamoto didn't expand it in the ways he could have. Instead, he has an Armi-tentacle going into EVA-00's left butt cheek...

[]: Post by Dave » Mon Jan 03, 2005 10:09 pm Reichu wrote: I've long thought that Rei's spiritual encounter with Armisael (the Inner Universe scene) was sourly underdone...

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 04, 2005 1:45 am Dave wrote: Personally, I've always felt that that scene was directed perfectly. Please elaborate on your disappointment.

[]: Post by Dave » Tue Jan 04, 2005 2:00 am Sure they could of added more, that can be said for just about any scene ever. I love that scene, probably one of my favorites in any show. No need to butcher it by adding unesessary information. Remember, with Rei, less is more.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 04, 2005 8:20 am Dave wrote: Sure they could of added more, that can be said for just about any scene ever.

[]: Post by Soluzar » Fri Feb 11, 2005 12:18 pm Reichu wrote: Dave wrote: Sure they could of added more, that can be said for just about any scene ever.

[]: Post by Hexon.Arq » Fri Feb 11, 2005 4:07 pm It's okay, kids, it's just a manga. It's not... the Bible. Yet.

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 11, 2005 10:43 pm Soluzar wrote: He has a unique opportunity here to show a more coherent version of the story than has otherwise been presented, and it's always a shame when he doesn't grasp that opportunity with both hands. I really don't know what's going on with the manga. It's hardly dissapointing in absolute terms, but at the same time, it doesn't seem to be all that it could have been.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Feb 12, 2005 7:14 am Reichu wrote: Did Lilith regenerating when the Spear was pulled out and the Spear transforming to "power up" really add anything?

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Feb 27, 2005 12:18 pm New stage just in. Stage 65: I want to become one (with you) Cover: Rei sitting in plug suit, looking off to the side with a distant, slightly wistful expression. Scene: Eva cage The lock bolts blow and Eva-01 is launched shooting up the rails. The ground elevator doors open and Eva-01 emerges into the New Tokyo-3 cityscape. Misato: Deploy your A.T.Field all the way! And be careful to avoid contact with the target. No matter what, you are to rescue Rei, entry plug and all, by sheer brute force (if necessary). Shinji: Roger! (grips induction levers) Shinji (thinking) Hold on, Ayanami. Because I'm coming (for you) now. (Eva-00 sits crumpled amidst the trees with the Angel still penetrating it from multiple points and the huge mass with distorted shapes of past Angels bulging from its back. Rei sits stunned and crying in the entry plug, but then she comes to with a start and looks over in shock to see Eva-01 rushing towards her. Rei (thinking): Ikari-kun!? (Eva-01 runs toward Eva-00 and the Angel, but an Angel strand rises up from the bulging mass with the tip splitting into what looks like fingers and rushes toward Eva-01. Rei opens her mouth as if to shout, but can only watch in shock.) Rei (thinking): No! (The Angel strand whips through the trees and Eva-01 raises its positron rifle to ready position. As the Angel strand approaches, the tip is now clearly visible as a hand reaching out for the Eva. Eva-01 fires a couple of shots from its rifle, but they have no effect and the Angel loops and crashes through the rifle barrel, shattering it. (Shinji = shocked expression) The Angel then loops around Eva-01 and reaches in to grab the Eva's right wrist. Shinji: Ku...! (Rei stares in shock. The Angel veins have now extended to her face, and tears are forming in her eyes. The Angel begins to merge with Eva-01's wrist/hand/arm, and Shinji clenches his teeth in the entry plug. Veins also start to spread from Shinji's wrist, and tiny Rei torsos form on his hand. Rei watches as Eva-01 grasps the Angel strand with its other hand, but the strand branches and the new strand forms into an image of Rei (naked) herself.) Rei (thinking): Is that my heart? I want to be with Ikari. My heart... (The Angel/Rei circles and holds/hugs Eva-01 from behind its right shoulder pauldron, looking up at the Eva's face in longing and adoration.) (Eva-02 sits crumpled amidst the trees with the Angel penetrating its midsection. Kaworu sits slumped in the entry plug.) Kaworu: *!?* What is this...? Kaworu (thinking): Something is coming, flowing in...... What? (Tears form in his eyes and fall, but he stares in puzzlement.) What is this? Misato: Shinji! Counter with your prog knife!! Shinji: Okay! (Eva-01's shoulder pauldron snaps open and the Eva reaches up and grabs the prog knife. With a determined expression, Shinji shakes off the Angel/Rei (not shown), reverses the prog knife to an overhand grip (not shown), and plunges it toward the Angel/Rei. But the knife stops short of the Angel/Rei which makes no effort to defend itself and instead looks up at the Eva with arms outstretched in a reaching/cupping manner and a "Why?" expression on its face. Shinji's inner conflict shows on his face, and the Eva's hand shakes.) Shinji (thinking): No, if I don't do it then both Ayanami and I will be killed. (speaking to himself) Just do it!! (Eva-01 plunges the prog knife deep into the Angel/Rei, cutting from just below the breasts down to the abdomen. Blood spurts forth from the deep gash, and the Angel/Rei arches backwards with a scream of pain "GYAAAAAAAAAA!!!" -- Shinji stops short in alarm/concern.) Shinji: Ayanami!! (The Angel/Rei rises back up (i.e. vampire style) with an eerie happy expression and hugs the Eva's neck/face. Veins start appearing on Shinji's neck/face, and he grunts in pain.) Shinji: Guh... unh... A-... Ayanami (closes eyes and cries out) Ayanamiiiiiii!! (Rei stares in shock, then gets a determined expression on her face. Eva-00 wraps its arms around itself and tenses.) Maya: *!!* Eva-00's A.T.Field is inverting! It's being penetrated all at once! Ritsuko (shocked): Does she intend to suppress/immobilize the Angel!? (The Angel/Rei is torn away from Eva-01's face. Shinji stares in surprise as the Angel/Rei is dragged screaming back toward Eva-00, blood spurting and an expression of shock/loss on its face.) Angel/Rei: KYAAAAAAAAAA!!! (The Angel/Rei is sucked back into Eva-00 along with the bulging mass.) Misato: Rei! What are you doing! Abandon the unit and escape! Rei: No. If I leave here, the A.T.Field will disappear. So I can't. (Rei reaches back and pulls/twists a handle on the entry plug seat. A drive (Drive: A, MODE: D) starts spinning with a whine.) Misato: Rei... Does she mean to die? Shinji (shouting): Ayanami!? Kaworu (still crying/thinking): She can't be... Gendo: Rei!! (Eva-00's distended core begins to compact/implode in spherical cavities.) Maya: The core will be crushed! It's exceeded the critical limit!! (Bright light condenses and pours out in rays from the area of Eva-00's core. Inside the entry plug, Rei, bathed in light and with tears flowing from her eyes, turns and looks over her shoulder to see an apparition of Gendo (no glasses) smiling tenderly at her. She smiles back, and in the next moment an enormous explosion envelopes the shoreline of Ashinoko Lake adjoining New Tokyo-3. - End Stage 65

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 27, 2005 4:36 pm Well, at least EVA-00 didn't turn into a giant naked Rei. So if Armisael initiated a menage a trois in the original episode, what do you call it when one additional partner is involved?

 of water with ripples spreading outward from a point in front of her.) Rei (thinking): Who is it? (Her eyes widen and she sees a figure of herself, head lowered, rising from the center of the ripples.) Rei (thinking): Me? The me inside Eva? (The figure rises past waist level.) Rei (thinking): No, that's wrong. It's not me. Who? Who are you? (The two "Rei" face each other, Rei floating slightly above the water surface (no vein-like marks), and the other Rei stopped at upper thigh level with its head lowered so that the eyes are hidden.) (Eva-02 grasps at the Angel strand penetrating its midsection. Kaworu sweats/suffers slightly inside the plug but also has a slightly amused expression.) Kaworu (thinking): Haha... Kaworu (thinking): That's right... so just stay there and behave yourself for a bit. (Rei's inner world...) Rei: Angel... Are you a person that we call an Angel? Other Rei: Won't you become one with me? Rei: No. I am me. I am not you. Other Rei: Yes, but it doesn't matter. It's too late. I will share my heart with you. There are many of us, but you are alone and you don't like that. Other Rei: Is that called lonely? But, that is your heart. You must have noticed it... Since long before... But you pretended like you didn't notice it. That, and also your even uglier heart. Rei (shocked): Ugly...

Stunned, she raises her hands in a cupping motion and watches as the tears fall through them.) Rei: Tears... Are these tears...? Am I the one who is crying? Is it me? (Eva-00's back plates split open and a huge mass billows out. Distorted shapes of past Angels can be seen in the rapidly expanding bulk.) Shinji: Ayanami!! Misato: Rei!! ato (looking back over shoulder in surprise): What? Gendo (standing): Eva-01's freeze is lifted! Deploy! Misato: Yes, sir. Misato (over radio): Shinji? You heard that, right? Let's go! Shinji (determined inside entry plug): Yes, sir! - End Stage 64

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Dec 30, 2004 12:10 am Highly unlikely, considering the fact that I've looked on more than one occasion. The problem with the Eva manga is that its distribution is so erratic (with multiple gaps of upwards of a year) most scanlators would get tired of it. Not to mention its a licensed series. Most fan sub/scanlators are pretty good about discontinuing licensed series. The best you can do when it comes to the Eva manga is read the fan translations that Bochan_Bird does. And unlike scanlations, they're small text files, and he whips them out a day or two after the stage is published. I posted a link in this topic with an archive of the last two volumes worth of stages. If you're that desperate to know what happens, read them. Otherwise go out and actually buy it.
